channel.title: Comments on: 2011 North Texas Beer Festival, Ep. 136
channel.description: Beer America TV is the first beer web site dedicated to the specialty craft brewing world with video on industry experts and insiders plus more!

item.title: By: Video BrewMaster
item.dc:creator: Video BrewMaster
item.description: Frank, those are a great 2 pennies worth of advice!! It's real easy to drink to much at beer festivals which isn't good for many obvious reasons - but mainly because after a while the quantity will mess up your taste buds, your brain, and the purpose of going to a beer festival!
item.content:encoded: Frank, those are a great 2 pennies worth of advice!! It’s real easy to drink to much at beer festivals which isn’t good for many obvious reasons – but mainly because after a while the quantity will mess up your taste buds, your brain, and the purpose of going to a beer festival!

item.title: By: Frank Russo
item.dc:creator: Frank Russo
item.description:
Want to chime in with my 2 cents worth on how to sample at a Craft Beer Festival. 2 paths: 1) Pick out a few brewers that interest you and sample there brews. 2) and this is my preference pick out 2 beer styles and drink only those you find.
Frank Secretary Savannah Home Brewers
item.content:encoded:
Want to chime in with my 2 cents worth on how to sample at a Craft Beer Festival. 2 paths: 1) Pick out a few brewers that interest you and sample there brews. 2) and this is my preference pick out 2 beer styles and drink only those you find.

Frank
Secretary
Savannah Home Brewers
